role_summary: the m&a consultant advises clients on mergers, acquisitions, divestments, and restructuring  transactions.
responsibilities: • support m&a transactions end -to-end  • perform financial analysis and valuation   • assist in deal structuring and  negotiations   • coordinate due diligence activities   • prepare pitch decks and transaction documents   • liaise with clients, legal, and regulatory teams
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong m&a and transaction advisory experience   • strategic and deal executi on skills
